/.env: 
# ============= ĶĄŃŅŠĪÉŹČ ĻŠĪÅŹŅĄ =============
PROJECT_NAME=TestProject
COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=testproject

# ============= ĪŃĶĪĀĶŪÅ ĶĄŃŅŠĪÉŹČ =============
NODE_ENV=development
APP_PORT=4000
LOG_LEVEL=info
API_PREFIX=/api/v1

# ============= ĮĄĒĄ ÄĄĶĶŪÕ (ĖĪŹĄĖÜĶĄß) =============
DB_HOST=postgres-test
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=testdb
DB_USER=test_user
DB_PASSWORD=test123

# ============= ĮĄĒĄ ÄĄĶĶŪÕ (YANDEX CLOUD - ÄĖß ĮÓÄÓŁÅĆĪ) =============
YC_DB_HOST=c9qXXXXX.mdb.yandexcloud.net
YC_DB_PORT=6432
YC_DB_NAME=testdb
YC_DB_USER=test_service

# ============= REDIS =============
REDIS_PORT=6379
REDIS_PASSWORD=redis123

# ============= PGADMIN =============
PGADMIN_PORT=8080
PGADMIN_EMAIL=admin@testproject.com
PGADMIN_PASSWORD=admin123

# ============= ĮÅĒĪĻĄŃĶĪŃŅÜ =============
JWT_SECRET=your_super_secret_jwt_key_change_in_production
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4000
RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=900000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX=100

# ============= ÄĖß ŠĄĒŠĄĮĪŅŹČ =============
DEBUG=test-service:*
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=512

# ============= ĶĄŃŅŠĪÉŹČ ĻŠČĖĪĘÅĶČß =============
LESSONS_PER_PAGE=20
COURSES_PER_PAGE=10

# ============= KUBERNETES (ĖĪŹĄĖÜĶĪ) =============
K8S_NAMESPACE=testproject-namespace
K8S_REGISTRY=localhost:5000
K8S_IMAGE_TAG=latest

# ============= SSL (ÄĖß YANDEX CLOUD) =============
SSL_MODE=disable
SSL_CA_PATH=/certs/yandex-ca.pem

# ============= ĮŻŹĄĻŪ =============
BACKUP_ENABLED=true
BACKUP_SCHEDULE=0 2 * * *  # Źąęäūé äåķü ā 2 ķī÷č
BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=7

/docker-compose.yaml: 
services:
  # ==================== POSTGRESQL ====================
  postgres-test:
    container_name: testproject-postgres
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: testdb
      POSTGRES_USER: test_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test123
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U test_user -d testdb"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # ==================== REDIS ====================
  redis-test:
    container_name: testproject-redis
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes

  # ==================== TEST SERVICE (.NET) ====================
  test-service:
    container_name: testproject-test-service
    build:
      context: ./apps/test-service
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5000:8080"
    environment:
      ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT: Development
      ASPNETCORE_URLS: http://+:8080
      ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection: "Host=postgres-test;Port=5432;Database=testdb;Username=test_user;Password=test123"
    depends_on:
      postgres-test:
        condition: service_healthy

  # ==================== PGADMIN (ĪĻÖČĪĶĄĖÜĶĪ - ŅĪĖÜŹĪ ÄĖß ŠĄĒŠĄĮĪŅŹČ) ====================
  pgadmin-test:
    container_name: testproject-pgadmin
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    environment:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: admin@testproject.com
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: admin123
    volumes:
      - pgadmin_data:/var/lib/pgadmin
      - ./pgadmin-servers.json:/pgadmin4/servers.json  # ļšåäēąļīėķåķķūå ļīäźėž÷åķč’
    depends_on:
      - postgres-test
    profiles: ["pgadmin"]  # Ēąļóńźąåņń’ ņīėüźī ń ōėąćīģ --profile pgadmin

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  pgadmin_data:  # Volume äė’ õšąķåķč’ äąķķūõ pgAdmin 
 
/kustomization.yaml: 
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

# ============= ĪŃĶĪĀĶŪÅ ĶĄŃŅŠĪÉŹČ =============
namespace: testproject-namespace

namePrefix: testproject-
nameSuffix: -v1

commonLabels:
  app.kubernetes.io/name: testproject
  app.kubernetes.io/component: test-service
  app.kubernetes.io/part-of: testproject
  app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: kustomize
  app.kubernetes.io/version: "1.0.0"
  project: testproject

commonAnnotations:
  description: "TestProject - ģčźšīńåšāčń äė’ óļšąāėåķč’ źóšńąģč č óšīźąģč"
  environment: "development"
  maintainer: "TestProject Team"
  created-by: "kustomize"
  last-updated: "2024-01-01"

# ============= ŠÅŃÓŠŃŪ =============
resources:
  - ./infra/k8s/base/namespace.yaml
  # Šąńźīģģåķņčšīāąņü ļšč ńīēäąķčč:
  # - ./infra/k8s/base/postgres/
  # - ./infra/k8s/base/test-service/
  # - ./infra/k8s/base/networking/

# ============= CONFIGMAPS Č SECRETS =============
configMapGenerator:
  - name: testproject-config
    literals:
      - PROJECT_NAME=TestProject
      - APP_NAME=test-service
      - APP_PORT=4000
      - API_PREFIX=/api/v1
      - LOG_LEVEL=info
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - LESSONS_PER_PAGE=20
      - COURSES_PER_PAGE=10
  
  - name: testproject-postgres-config
    literals:
      - POSTGRES_DB=testdb
      - POSTGRES_USER=test_user
      - POSTGRES_PORT=5432

secretGenerator:
  - name: testproject-secrets
    literals:
      - DB_PASSWORD=test123
      - JWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret_key_change_in_production
      - REDIS_PASSWORD=redis123
    options:
      disableNameSuffixHash: true

# ============= ČĒĪĮŠĄĘÅĶČß =============
images:
  - name: test-service
    newName: ${REGISTRY:-localhost:5000}/testproject-test-service
    newTag: ${TAG:-latest}
  
  - name: postgres
    newName: postgres
    newTag: 15-alpine

# ============= PERSISTENT VOLUMES (äė’ ńīõšąķåķč’ äąķķūõ ā k8s) =============
# Ļščģåš źīķōčćóšąöčč PersistentVolumeClaim äė’ PostgreSQL
generatorOptions:
  disableNameSuffixHash: true

patchesStrategicMerge:
  - patches/persistent-volumes.yaml

# Ā patches/persistent-volumes.yaml ģīęķī īļšåäåėčņü:
# apiVersion: v1
# kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
# metadata:
#   name: testproject-postgres-pvc
# spec:
#   accessModes:
#     - ReadWriteOnce
#   resources:
#     requests:
#       storage: 10Gi
#   storageClassName: standard 
 
/Makefile: 
.PHONY: help setup build up down logs clean backup restore list-volumes

help:
	@echo "Äīńņóļķūå źīģąķäū äė’ TestProject:"
	@echo "  make setup          - Ķąńņšīéźą īźšóęåķč’ ļšīåźņą"
	@echo "  make build          - Ńįīšźą īįšąēą test-service"
	@echo "  make up             - Ēąļóńź āńåõ ńåšāčńīā (ń ņīģąģč)"
	@echo "  make down           - Īńņąķīāźą ńåšāčńīā (ņīģū ńīõšąķ’žņń’)"
	@echo "  make down-clean     - Īńņąķīāźą ń óäąėåķčåģ ņīģīā (ĻĪŅÅŠß ÄĄĶĶŪÕ!)"
	@echo "  make logs           - Ļšīńģīņš ėīćīā"
	@echo "  make psql           - Ļīäźėž÷åķčå ź ĮÄ"
	@echo "  make backup         - Ńīēäąķčå įżźąļą ĮÄ"
	@echo "  make restore        - Āīńńņąķīāėåķčå ĮÄ čē įżźąļą"
	@echo "  make list-volumes   - Ļīźąēąņü ņīģą ļšīåźņą"
	@echo "  make clean          - Ļīėķą’ ī÷čńņźą ļšīåźņą"
	@echo "  make setup-k8s      - Ķąńņšīéźą Docker Desktop Kubernetes"
	@echo "  make deploy-local   - Äåļėīé ā ėīźąėüķūé Kubernetes (Docker Desktop)"
	@echo "  make k8s-status     - Ļīźąēąņü ńņąņóń Kubernetes"

setup:
	@echo "Ķąńņšīéźą TestProject..."
	@cp .env.example .env || echo "Ōąéė .env óęå ńółåńņāóåņ"
	@echo "? Īņšåäąźņčšóéņå ōąéė .env, čēģåķčā ļąšīėč!"
	@mkdir -p backups
	@echo "? Ļąļźą äė’ įżźąļīā ńīēäąķą"

build:
	@echo "Ńįīšźą īįšąēą test-service..."
	@cd apps/test-service && docker build -t test-service:latest .
	@echo "? Īįšąē ńīįšąķ"

up:
	@echo "Ēąļóńź TestProject..."
	@docker-compose up -d
	@echo "? TestProject ēąļółåķ!"
	@echo "?? Test Service: http://localhost:4000"
	@echo "???  PostgreSQL: localhost:5432 (ļīėüēīāąņåėü: test_user, ĮÄ: testdb)"
	@echo "?? PGAdmin: http://localhost:8080 (ėīćčķ: admin@testproject.com / admin123)"
	@echo "?? Redis: localhost:6379"

down:
	@echo "Īńņąķīāźą ńåšāčńīā (ņīģū ńīõšąķ’žņń’)..."
	@docker-compose down
	@echo "? Ńåšāčńū īńņąķīāėåķū, äąķķūå ńīõšąķåķū ā ņīģąõ"

down-clean:
	@echo "??  ĀĶČĢĄĶČÅ: Įóäóņ óäąėåķū āńå ņīģą ń äąķķūģč!"
	@read -p "Āū óāåšåķū? (y/N): " confirm && [ $$confirm = y ] || exit 1
	@docker-compose down -v
	@echo "? Ńåšāčńū īńņąķīāėåķū, ņīģą óäąėåķū"

logs:
	@echo "Ėīćč test-service:"
	@docker-compose logs -f test-service

logs-db:
	@echo "Ėīćč PostgreSQL:"
	@docker-compose logs -f postgres-test

psql:
	@echo "Ļīäźėž÷åķčå ź PostgreSQL..."
	@docker-compose exec postgres-test psql -U test_user -d testdb

backup:
	@echo "Ńīēäąķčå įżźąļą įąēū äąķķūõ testdb..."
	@mkdir -p backups
	@docker-compose exec postgres-test pg_dump -U test_user testdb > backups/testdb_backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
	@echo "? Įżźąļ ńīēäąķ: backups/testdb_backup_*.sql"

restore:
	@echo "Āīńńņąķīāėåķčå įąēū äąķķūõ čē ļīńėåäķåćī įżźąļą..."
	@latest_backup=$$(ls -t backups/testdb_backup_*.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1) && \
	if [ -z "$$latest_backup" ]; then \
		echo "? Įżźąļū ķå ķąéäåķū"; \
	else \
		echo "Āīńńņąķąāėčāąåģ čē: $$latest_backup"; \
		docker-compose exec -T postgres-test psql -U test_user testdb < $$latest_backup; \
		echo "? Įąēą äąķķūõ āīńńņąķīāėåķą"; \
	fi

list-volumes:
	@echo "Ņīģą TestProject:"
	@docker volume ls --filter "name=testproject" --format "table {{.Name}}\t{{.Driver}}\t{{.Mountpoint}}"
	@echo ""
	@echo "Čńļīėüēīāąķčå ņīģīā:"
	@docker system df -v

clean:
	@echo "Ļīėķą’ ī÷čńņźą TestProject..."
	@docker-compose down -v
	@docker system prune -f
	@docker volume prune -f
	@echo "? Ī÷čńņźą ēąāåšųåķą"

# Źīģąķäū äė’ óļšąāėåķč’ äąķķūģč
inspect-volumes:
	@echo "Čķōīšģąöč’ ī ņīģąõ:"
	@docker volume inspect testproject-postgres-data testproject-app-logs testproject-redis-data 2>/dev/null || echo "Ņīģą ķå ķąéäåķū"

volume-size:
	@echo "Šąēģåšū ņīģīā:"
	@docker run --rm -v testproject-postgres-data:/data alpine sh -c "du -sh /data 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ņīģ ļóńņ'"
	@docker run --rm -v testproject-app-logs:/data alpine sh -c "du -sh /data 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ņīģ ļóńņ'"

# Ļšīāåšźą ńīõšąķķīńņč äąķķūõ
check-data:
	@echo "Ļšīāåšźą ńīõšąķķīńņč äąķķūõ..."
	@echo "1. Ļšīāåš’åģ PostgreSQL:"
	@docker-compose exec postgres-test psql -U test_user -d testdb -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses;" || echo "Ņąįėčöą courses ķå ńółåńņāóåņ"
	@echo "2. Ļšīāåš’åģ Redis:"
	@docker-compose exec redis-test redis-cli -a redis123 ping || echo "Redis ķåäīńņóļåķ"

# Ķąńņšīéźą Docker Desktop Kubernetes
setup-k8s:
	@echo "?? Ķąńņšīéźą Docker Desktop Kubernetes äė’ TestProject..."
	@echo "1. Ļšīāåš’åģ Docker Desktop..."
	@if ! docker info > /dev/null 2>&1; then \
		echo "? Docker Desktop ķå ēąļółåķ"; \
		echo "   Ēąļóńņčņå Docker Desktop č āźėž÷čņå Kubernetes:"; \
		echo "   Settings > Kubernetes > Enable Kubernetes"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi
	@echo "? Docker Desktop ēąļółåķ"
	
	@echo "2. Ļšīāåš’åģ Kubernetes..."
	@if ! kubectl cluster-info > /dev/null 2>&1; then \
		echo "? Kubernetes ķå ēąļółåķ ā Docker Desktop"; \
		echo "   Āźėž÷čņå Kubernetes ā Docker Desktop:"; \
		echo "   Settings > Kubernetes > Enable Kubernetes"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi
	@echo "? Kubernetes ēąļółåķ"
	
	@echo "3. Óńņąķąāėčāąåģ nginx ingress controller..."
	@kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes/ingress-nginx/controller-v1.8.2/deploy/static/provider/cloud/deploy.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo "Ingress controller óęå óńņąķīāėåķ"
	
	@echo "4. Īęčäąåģ ēąļóńź ingress controller..."
	@kubectl wait --namespace ingress-nginx \
		--for=condition=ready pod \
		--selector=app.kubernetes.io/component=controller \
		--timeout=120s 2>/dev/null || echo "Ļšīļóńźąåģ īęčäąķčå"
	
	@echo "?? Ķąńņšīéźą ēąāåšųåķą!"
	@echo "?? Äė’ äåļėī’ āūļīėķčņå: make deploy-local"

# Ļīźąēąņü ńņąņóń Kubernetes
k8s-status:
	@echo "?? Ńņąņóń Docker Desktop Kubernetes:"
	@echo "Kubernetes źīķņåźńņ:"
	@kubectl config current-context
	@echo ""
	@echo "Ķīäū:"
	@kubectl get nodes
	@echo ""
	@echo "Ļšīńņšąķńņāą čģåķ:"
	@kubectl get namespaces
	@echo ""
	@echo "Ingress controller:"
	@kubectl get pods -n ingress-nginx

# Äåļėīé ā ėīźąėüķūé Kubernetes (Docker Desktop)
deploy-local:
	@echo "?? Äåļėīé TestProject ā Docker Desktop Kubernetes..."
	@echo "1. Ļščģåķ’åģ ģąķčōåńņū..."
	@kubectl apply -k infra/k8s/overlays/local
	@echo ""
	@echo "2. Īęčäąåģ ēąļóńź ļīäīā..."
	@kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=test-service -n testproject-namespace --timeout=300s
	@echo ""
	@echo "? Äåļėīé ēąāåšųåķ!"
	@echo ""
	@echo "?? Ņī÷źč äīńņóļą:"
	@echo "   Ļščėīęåķčå:    http://localhost:8080"
	@echo "   Health check:  http://localhost:8080/health"
	@echo "   Swagger UI:    http://localhost:8080/swagger"
	@echo "   Ģåņščźč:       http://localhost:8080/metrics"
	@echo ""
	@echo "?? Ļšīāåščņü ńīńņī’ķčå:"
	@echo "   kubectl get all -n testproject-namespace"
	@echo "   kubectl get ingress -n testproject-namespace"

# Ī÷čńņźą Kubernetes
k8s-clean:
	@echo "?? Ī÷čńņźą Kubernetes šąēāåšņūāąķč’..."
	@kubectl delete -k infra/k8s/overlays/local --ignore-not-found
	@echo "? Ī÷čńņźą ēąāåšųåķą"

# Ļīšņ-ōīšāąšäčķć äė’ äīńņóļą ź ńåšāčńąģ
port-forward:
	@echo "?? Ķąńņšīéźą ļīšņ-ōīšāąšäčķćą..."
	@echo "1. Test Service (ļīšņ 8080)..."
	@kubectl port-forward svc/test-service 8080:8080 -n testproject-namespace &
	@echo "2. PostgreSQL (ļīšņ 5432)..."
	@kubectl port-forward svc/postgres 5432:5432 -n testproject-namespace &
	@echo ""
	@echo "?? Ņī÷źč äīńņóļą:"
	@echo "   Ļščėīęåķčå: http://localhost:8080"
	@echo "   PostgreSQL: localhost:5432"
	@echo ""
	@echo "Äė’ īńņąķīāźč: pkill -f 'kubectl port-forward'"

/README.md: 
# ?? Ģčźšīńåšāčń Test Service

Ļšīńņīé č ģąńųņąįčšóåģūé ģčźšīńåšāčń äė’ óļšąāėåķč’ ņåńņīāūģč äąķķūģč, ćīņīāūé ź šąįīņå ń Docker Compose, Docker Desktop Kubernetes č īįėą÷ķūģ šąēāåšņūāąķčåģ.

## ?? Īńīįåķķīńņč

- ? **REST API** äė’ óļšąāėåķč’ ņåńņīāūģč ńółķīńņ’ģč
- ? **PostgreSQL 15** ń ąāņīģąņč÷åńźčģč ģčćšąöč’ģč
- ? **Docker Compose** äė’ ėīźąėüķīé šąēšąįīņźč
- ? **Docker Desktop Kubernetes** äė’ ėīźąėüķīćī K8s
- ? **Kubernetes-ready** ąšõčņåźņóšą äė’ ļšīäąźųåķą
- ? **Health checks** äė’ ģīķčņīščķćą
- ? **Ćīņīāą’ ģčćšąöč’** ā Yandex Cloud
- ? **Ąāņīģąņč÷åńźčå įżźąļū** įąēū äąķķūõ
- ? **Ļīėķą’ CI/CD** ńčńņåģą

## ??? Įūńņšūé ńņąšņ

### Ļšåäāąščņåėüķūå ņšåįīāąķč’

- [Docker Desktop](https://docs.docker.com/get-docker/) (āåšńč’ 4.15+)
- [Docker Compose](https://docs.docker.com/compose/install/)
- Node.js 18+ čėč .NET 10+ (ā ēąāčńčģīńņč īņ ńņåźą)
- kubectl (óńņąķąāėčāąåņń’ ń Docker Desktop)

### Ēąļóńź ń Docker Compose (ńąģūé įūńņšūé ńļīńīį)

1. **Źėīķčšóéņå ļšīåźņ:**
   ```bash
   git clone <your-repo-url>
   cd testproject 
 
/.github\workflows\bug_report.md:

/.github\workflows\dependabot.yml: 
version: 2
updates:
  # Īįķīāėåķčå npm ēąāčńčģīńņåé
  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
    directory: "/apps/test-service"
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"
      day: "monday"
      time: "09:00"
      timezone: "Europe/Moscow"
    labels:
      - "dependencies"
      - "npm"
    commit-message:
      prefix: "npm"
      include: "scope"
    
  # Īįķīāėåķčå Docker īįšąēīā
  - package-ecosystem: "docker"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"
    labels:
      - "dependencies"
      - "docker"
    
  # Īįķīāėåķčå GitHub Actions
  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"
    labels:
      - "dependencies"
      - "github-actions" 
 
/.github\workflows\deploy-local.yaml: 
name: TestProject CI - Local Development (.NET)

on:
  push:
    branches: [ develop, feature/* ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

permissions:
  contents: read
  checks: write
  pull-requests: write

env:
  # Ķąńņšīéźč Docker īįšąēą
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: ${{ github.repository }}
  SERVICE_NAME: test-service
  
  # Ķąńņšīéźč Kubernetes
  K8S_NAMESPACE: testproject-namespace
  
  # Ķąńņšīéźč ļšīåźņą
  PROJECT_NAME: TestProject
  
  # .NET settings
  DOTNET_VERSION: '10.0.x'
  DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH: 'apps/test-service/'
  SOLUTION_FILE: 'YourSolution.sln'
  WEBAPI_PROJECT: 'WebApi/WebApi.csproj'

jobs:
  # ==================== ĻŠĪĀÅŠŹĄ ŹĪÄĄ .NET ====================
  dotnet-validation:
    name: .NET Validation & Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup .NET 10
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
      with:
        dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}
    
    - name: Restore dependencies
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet restore ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }}
    
    - name: Build solution
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet build ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} --configuration Debug --no-restore
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet test ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} --configuration Debug --no-build --verbosity normal
    
    - name: Run code analysis
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet format --verify-no-changes
        dotnet list ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} package --vulnerable --include-transitive
    
    - name: Security scan with OWASP
      uses: dependency-review-action@v3
      with:
        fail-on-severity: high

  # ==================== ŃĮĪŠŹĄ DOCKER ĪĮŠĄĒĄ .NET ====================
  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push .NET Docker Image
    needs: dotnet-validation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up Docker Buildx
      uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
    
    - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
      uses: docker/login-action@v3
      with:
        registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
        username: ${{ github.actor }}
        password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    
    - name: Extract metadata for Docker
      id: meta
      uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
      with:
        images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ github.repository }}/${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}
        tags: |
          type=ref,event=branch
          type=ref,event=pr
          type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
          type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}
    
    - name: Build and push Docker image (.NET)
      uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
      with:
        context: ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        file: ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}/Dockerfile
        push: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' }}
        tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
        labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
        cache-from: type=gha
        cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
        build-args: |
          BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Debug
    
    - name: Scan image for vulnerabilities
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        image-ref: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
        format: 'sarif'
        output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
    
    - name: Upload Trivy scan results
      uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v2
      if: always()
      with:
        sarif_file: 'trivy-results.sarif'

  # ==================== ÄÅĻĖĪÉ Ā ĖĪŹĄĖÜĶŪÉ K8s Ń ĻĪĢĪŁÜŽ KIND (.NET) ====================
  deploy-to-local:
    name: Deploy to Kind K8s (.NET)
    needs: build-and-push
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup Kind cluster
      uses: container-tools/kind-action@v1
      with:
        version: v0.20.0
        cluster_name: testproject-ci-cluster
        config: |
          kind: Cluster
          apiVersion: kind.x-k8s.io/v1alpha4
          nodes:
          - role: control-plane
            kubeadmConfigPatches:
            - |
              kind: InitConfiguration
              nodeRegistration:
                kubeletExtraArgs:
                  node-labels: "ingress-ready=true"
            extraPortMappings:
            - containerPort: 80
              hostPort: 80
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 443
              hostPort: 443
              protocol: TCP
    
    - name: Setup kubectl
      uses: azure/setup-kubectl@v3
    
    - name: Install nginx ingress controller
      run: |
        kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes/ingress-nginx/main/deploy/static/provider/kind/deploy.yaml
        kubectl wait --namespace ingress-nginx \
          --for=condition=ready pod \
          --selector=app.kubernetes.io/component=controller \
          --timeout=90s
    
    - name: Create namespace if not exists
      run: |
        kubectl create namespace ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
    
    - name: Load Docker image to Kind cluster
      run: |
        # Ēąćšóęąåģ īįšąē ā Kind
        kind load docker-image ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}:local --name testproject-ci-cluster || echo "Using already built image"
    
    - name: Apply Kubernetes manifests for local
      run: |
        # Ļščģåķ’åģ įąēīāūå ģąķčōåńņū
        kubectl apply -f manifests/namespace.yaml
        kubectl apply -f manifests/service-account.yaml
        kubectl apply -f manifests/cluster-role.yaml
        kubectl apply -f manifests/cluster-role-binding.yaml
        
        # Ļščģåķ’åģ źīķōčćóšąöčč ļščėīęåķč’ ń ļīģīłüž Kustomize
        cd infra/k8s/overlays/local/
        
        # Ńīēäąåģ kustomization äė’ CI
        cat > kustomization-ci.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

namespace: ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}

resources:
  - ../../base/namespace/
  - ../../base/postgres/
  - ../../base/networking/
  - ../../base/monitoring/
  - ../../../manifests/

patchesStrategicMerge:
  - patch-app.yaml
  - patch-postgres.yaml
  - patch-ingress-ci.yaml

configMapGenerator:
  - name: test-service-config
    namespace: ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    behavior: merge
    literals:
      - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development
      - DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Development
      - ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection=Host=postgres;Port=5432;Database=testdb;Username=postgres;Password=localdev123

images:
  - name: test-service
    newName: ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}
    newTag: local

commonLabels:
  environment: ci
  deployment: kind-ci
EOF
        
        kustomize build . --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone | kubectl apply -f -
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ ńīńņī’ķčå
        kubectl get all -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    
    - name: Wait for deployment to be ready (.NET)
      run: |
        kubectl wait --for=condition=available \
          --timeout=300s \
          deployment/test-service \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    
    - name: Run smoke tests (.NET)
      run: |
        # Óńņąķąāėčāąåģ ļīšņ-ōīšāąšäčķć äė’ ņåńņčšīāąķč’
        kubectl port-forward svc/test-service 8080:8080 -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} &
        sleep 10
        
        echo "Testing service at: http://localhost:8080"
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ health endpoint
        curl -f http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ readiness
        curl -f http://localhost:8080/health/ready || exit 1
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ Swagger
        curl -f http://localhost:8080/swagger/v1/swagger.json || echo "Swagger not available"
        
        echo "? .NET Smoke tests passed"
    
    - name: Show access information
      if: always()
      run: |
        echo ""
        echo "?? Service is available at: http://localhost:8080"
        echo "?? Swagger UI: http://localhost:8080/swagger"
        echo "?? Health checks: http://localhost:8080/health"
        echo ""
        echo "?? Cluster status:"
        kubectl get all -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        echo ""
        echo "?? To cleanup: kind delete cluster --name testproject-ci-cluster"

  # ==================== ŅÅŃŅČŠĪĀĄĶČÅ Ń DOCKER COMPOSE (.NET) ====================
  docker-compose-test:
    name: Docker Compose Tests (.NET)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup Docker Compose
      uses: isbang/compose-action@v1.4.1
    
    - name: Setup .NET 10
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
      with:
        dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}
    
    - name: Create .env file for testing
      run: |
        cp .env.example .env.test
        echo "DB_PASSWORD=test_github_actions_123" >> .env.test
        echo "JWT_SECRET=github_actions_test_secret" >> .env.test
        echo "ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development" >> .env.test
        echo "ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection=Host=postgres;Port=5432;Database=testdb;Username=postgres;Password=test_github_actions_123" >> .env.test
    
    - name: Start services with Docker Compose (.NET)
      run: |
        cd docker/
        docker-compose -f docker-compose.local.yaml --env-file ../.env.test up -d --build
    
    - name: Wait for services to be ready (.NET)
      run: |
        # Ęäåģ PostgreSQL
        until docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.local.yaml exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres; do
          echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL..."
          sleep 2
        done
        
        # Ęäåģ .NET ļščėīęåķčå
        echo "Waiting for .NET application..."
        for i in $(seq 1 30); do
          if curl -f http://localhost:5000/health 2>/dev/null; then
            echo ".NET application is ready!"
            break
          fi
          echo "Attempt $i: .NET application not ready yet..."
          sleep 2
        done
    
    - name: Run EF Core migrations for tests
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        # Ńīēäąåģ ģčćšąöčč äė’ ņåńņīāīé ĮÄ
        dotnet ef migrations add TestMigration --project ${{ env.WEBAPI_PROJECT }} --context ApplicationDbContext || echo "Migrations already exist"
        dotnet ef database update --project ${{ env.WEBAPI_PROJECT }} --context ApplicationDbContext
    
    - name: Run integration tests (.NET)
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        
        # Ēąļóńźąåģ ņåńņū
        dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration" --verbosity normal || echo "No integration tests found"
        
        # Ēąļóńźąåģ unit ņåńņū
        dotnet test --filter "Category!=Integration" --verbosity normal
    
    - name: Test API endpoints
      run: |
        # Ņåńņčšóåģ API żķäļīčķņū
        curl -f http://localhost:5000/health || exit 1
        curl -f http://localhost:5000/swagger/v1/swagger.json || exit 1
        
        # Ēäåńü ģīęķī äīįąāčņü ņåńņū āąųčõ ńļåöčōč÷ķūõ API endpoints
        # curl -f http://localhost:5000/api/v1/courses || exit 1
        # curl -f http://localhost:5000/api/v1/lessons || exit 1
        
        echo "? API tests passed"
    
    - name: Stop services
      if: always()
      run: |
        cd docker/
        docker-compose -f docker-compose.local.yaml down -v

  # ==================== ĻŠĪĀÅŠŹĄ ĢĄĶČŌÅŃŅĪĀ KUBERNETES ====================
  k8s-manifests-check:
    name: Validate K8s Manifests (.NET)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup kubectl
      uses: azure/setup-kubectl@v3
    
    - name: Validate manifests with kubeval
      uses: instrumenta/kubeval-action@master
      with:
        files: infra/k8s/base/
    
    - name: Lint manifests with kube-linter
      uses: stackrox/kube-linter-action@v1
      with:
        config: .github/kube-linter-config.yaml
        paths: infra/k8s/base/
    
    - name: Check Kustomize build for local
      run: |
        cd infra/k8s/overlays/local
        kustomize build . > /dev/null
        echo "? Kustomize build for local successful"
    
    - name: Check .NET specific manifests
      run: |
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ, ÷ņī deployment.yaml ļīäõīäčņ äė’ .NET
        DEPLOYMENT_FILE="apps/test-service/k8s/deployment.yaml"
        if [ -f "$DEPLOYMENT_FILE" ]; then
          echo "Checking .NET deployment file..."
          
          # Ļšīāåš’åģ ļīšņ (äīėęåķ įūņü 8080 äė’ .NET)
          PORT=$(grep -A1 "containerPort" "$DEPLOYMENT_FILE" | grep -o '[0-9]*' | head -1)
          if [ "$PORT" != "8080" ]; then
            echo "??  Warning: .NET apps usually use port 8080, found: $PORT"
          fi
          
          # Ļšīāåš’åģ readiness/liveness probes
          if ! grep -q "/health" "$DEPLOYMENT_FILE"; then
            echo "??  Warning: Health checks might be missing for .NET"
          fi
        fi
        
        echo "? .NET manifests check completed"

  # ==================== ŃĪĒÄĄĶČÅ ĪŅ×ÅŅĄ (.NET) ====================
  generate-report:
    name: Generate Test Report (.NET)
    needs: [dotnet-validation, docker-compose-test, k8s-manifests-check]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Generate summary report
      run: |
        echo "# TestProject CI Report (.NET 10)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "**Build:** ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "**Branch:** ${{ github.ref }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "**.NET Version:** ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        
        echo "## Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- ? .NET Validation & Tests: ${{ needs.dotnet-validation.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- ? Docker Compose Tests: ${{ needs.docker-compose-test.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- ? K8s Validation: ${{ needs.k8s-manifests-check.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        
        if [ "${{ needs.build-and-push.result }}" != "null" ]; then
          echo "- ? Docker Build: ${{ needs.build-and-push.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        fi
        
        if [ "${{ needs.deploy-to-local.result }}" != "null" ]; then
          echo "- ? K8s Deployment: ${{ needs.deploy-to-local.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        fi
        
        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "## Build Details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- **Solution:** ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- **Entry Project:** ${{ env.WEBAPI_PROJECT }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "- **Service Name:** ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        
        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "## Local Development" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "To run locally with Docker Desktop:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "```bash" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "# Using Docker Desktop Kubernetes" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "make setup-k8s" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "make deploy-local" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "# Access at: http://localhost:8080" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "```" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        
        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "## Docker Compose" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "```bash" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "cd docker" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "docker-compose -f docker-compose.local.yaml up --build" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "```" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        
        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "## Next Steps" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "1. Review the changes" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "2. Merge to main for production deployment" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
        echo "3. Monitor deployment in production" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY 
 
/.github\workflows\deploy-prod.yaml: 
name: TestProject CD - Production Deployment (.NET 10)

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  release:
    types: [published]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Environment to deploy to'
        required: true
        default: 'production'
        type: choice
        options:
        - production
        - staging

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  packages: write

env:
  # Yandex Cloud
  YC_FOLDER_ID: ${{ secrets.YC_FOLDER_ID }}
  YC_CLOUD_ID: ${{ secrets.YC_CLOUD_ID }}
  YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY: ${{ secrets.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
  
  # Docker
  REGISTRY: cr.yandex
  REGISTRY_ID: ${{ secrets.YC_REGISTRY_ID }}
  IMAGE_NAME: test-service
  
  # Kubernetes
  K8S_CLUSTER_ID: ${{ secrets.YC_K8S_CLUSTER_ID }}
  K8S_NAMESPACE: testproject-namespace
  
  # Database
  DB_CLUSTER_ID: ${{ secrets.YC_DB_CLUSTER_ID }}
  
  # Project
  PROJECT_NAME: TestProject
  ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'production' }}
  
  # .NET settings
  DOTNET_VERSION: '10.0.x'
  DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH: 'apps/test-service/'
  SOLUTION_FILE: 'YourSolution.sln'
  WEBAPI_PROJECT: 'WebApi/WebApi.csproj'

jobs:
  # ==================== ĻĪÄĆĪŅĪĀŹĄ ====================
  setup:
    name: Setup Environment (.NET 10)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      image_tag: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
      short_sha: ${{ steps.sha.outputs.short }}
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    
    - name: Determine image tag
      id: tag
      run: |
        if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "release" ]]; then
          echo "tag=${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        elif [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
          SHORT_SHA=${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}
          echo "tag=latest-$SHORT_SHA" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        else
          SHORT_SHA=${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}
          echo "tag=$SHORT_SHA" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        fi
    
    - name: Get short SHA
      id: sha
      run: |
        SHORT_SHA=${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}
        echo "short=$SHORT_SHA" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    
    - name: Setup environment variables
      run: |
        echo "IMAGE_TAG=${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "SHORT_SHA=${{ steps.sha.outputs.short }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_ENV

  # ==================== ĀĄĖČÄĄÖČß ŹĪÄĄ ====================
  code-validation:
    name: Validate .NET Code
    needs: setup
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup .NET 10
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
      with:
        dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}
    
    - name: Install dotnet-ef tool
      run: |
        dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef
        echo "${{ github.workspace }}" >> $GITHUB_PATH
    
    - name: Restore dependencies
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet restore ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }}
    
    - name: Build solution
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet build ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} --configuration Release --no-restore
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet test ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} --configuration Release --no-build --verbosity normal
    
    - name: Code analysis
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        dotnet format --verify-no-changes
        dotnet list ${{ env.SOLUTION_FILE }} package --vulnerable --include-transitive

  # ==================== ŃĮĪŠŹĄ Č ĻÓŲ ĪĮŠĄĒĄ (.NET) ====================
  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push .NET Image
    needs: [setup, code-validation]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up Docker Buildx
      uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
    
    - name: Configure Yandex Cloud CLI
      uses: yandex-cloud/github-actions/setup-yc@v0.2.0
      with:
        service-account-key: ${{ env.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
    
    - name: Log in to Yandex Container Registry
      run: |
        yc container registry configure-docker
        echo "${{ secrets.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}" | docker login \
          --username json_key \
          --password-stdin \
          cr.yandex
    
    - name: Extract metadata for Docker
      id: meta
      uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
      with:
        images: cr.yandex/${{ env.REGISTRY_ID }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
        tags: |
          type=raw,value=${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}
          type=raw,value=latest
          type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-,format=short
    
    - name: Build and push Docker image (.NET 10)
      uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
      with:
        context: ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        file: ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}/Dockerfile
        push: true
        tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
        labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
        cache-from: type=gha
        cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
        build-args: |
          BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Release
    
    - name: Scan image for vulnerabilities
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        image-ref: 'cr.yandex/${{ env.REGISTRY_ID }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}'
        format: 'sarif'
        output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
    
    - name: Upload Trivy scan results
      uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v2
      if: always()
      with:
        sarif_file: 'trivy-results.sarif'

  # ==================== ĢČĆŠĄÖČČ ĮĄĒŪ ÄĄĶĶŪÕ (.NET EF CORE) ====================
  database-migrations:
    name: Run EF Core Migrations
    needs: [setup, build-and-push]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup .NET 10
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
      with:
        dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}
    
    - name: Configure Yandex Cloud CLI
      uses: yandex-cloud/github-actions/setup-yc@v0.2.0
      with:
        service-account-key: ${{ env.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
    
    - name: Get database connection details
      id: db-info
      run: |
        DB_INFO=$(yc managed-postgresql cluster get ${{ env.DB_CLUSTER_ID }} --format json)
        echo "host=$(echo $DB_INFO | jq -r '.hosts[0].name')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        echo "port=6432" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        echo "username=$(echo $DB_INFO | jq -r '.config.userSettings.user')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        echo "database=$(echo $DB_INFO | jq -r '.config.userSettings.database')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    
    - name: Download Yandex Cloud CA certificate
      run: |
        curl -s https://storage.yandexcloud.net/cloud-certs/CA.pem -o ca.pem
    
    - name: Generate EF Core migration bundle
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        
        # Ńīēäąåģ bundle ģčćšąöčé
        dotnet ef migrations bundle \
          --project ${{ env.WEBAPI_PROJECT }} \
          --configuration Release \
          --output ./migrations-bundle
        
        chmod +x ./migrations-bundle
    
    - name: Run migrations via bundle
      env:
        DB_HOST: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.host }}
        DB_PORT: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.port }}
        DB_USER: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.username }}
        DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.YC_DB_PASSWORD }}
        DB_NAME: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.database }}
        CA_CERT_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/ca.pem
      run: |
        cd ${{ env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH }}
        
        # Ńīēäąåģ ńņšīźó ļīäźėž÷åķč’ ń SSL
        CONNECTION_STRING="Host=$DB_HOST;Port=$DB_PORT;Database=$DB_NAME;Username=$DB_USER;Password=$DB_PASSWORD;Ssl Mode=VerifyFull;Root Certificate=$CA_CERT_PATH"
        
        # Ēąļóńźąåģ bundle ģčćšąöčé
        ./migrations-bundle --connection "$CONNECTION_STRING"
        
        echo "? EF Core migrations completed"
    
    - name: Verify migrations
      env:
        DB_HOST: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.host }}
        DB_PORT: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.port }}
        DB_USER: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.username }}
        DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.YC_DB_PASSWORD }}
        DB_NAME: ${{ steps.db-info.outputs.database }}
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y postgresql-client
        
        PGPASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD psql \
          "host=$DB_HOST \
           port=$DB_PORT \
           dbname=$DB_NAME \
           user=$DB_USER \
           sslmode=verify-full \
           sslrootcert=ca.pem" \
          -c "SELECT version();"
        
        PGPASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD psql \
          "host=$DB_HOST \
           port=$DB_PORT \
           dbname=$DB_NAME \
           user=$DB_USER \
           sslmode=verify-full \
           sslrootcert=ca.pem" \
          -c "SELECT * FROM __EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId DESC LIMIT 5;"

  # ==================== ÄÅĻĖĪÉ Ā YANDEX CLOUD KUBERNETES ====================
  deploy-to-production:
    name: Deploy to Yandex Cloud (.NET)
    needs: [setup, build-and-push, database-migrations]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    environment: production
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Configure Yandex Cloud CLI
      uses: yandex-cloud/github-actions/setup-yc@v0.2.0
      with:
        service-account-key: ${{ env.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
    
    - name: Get kubeconfig for Yandex Managed Kubernetes
      run: |
        yc managed-kubernetes cluster get-credentials \
          ${{ env.K8S_CLUSTER_ID }} \
          --external \
          --force
    
    - name: Set kubectl context
      run: |
        kubectl config use-context yc-${{ env.K8S_CLUSTER_ID }}
    
    - name: Create namespace if not exists
      run: |
        kubectl create namespace ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
    
    - name: Create or update ConfigMaps and Secrets
      run: |
        # Ńīēäąåģ ConfigMap ń ļåšåģåķķūģč īźšóęåķč’
        kubectl create configmap testproject-config \
          --from-literal=PROJECT_NAME=${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }} \
          --from-literal=ENVIRONMENT=${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }} \
          --from-literal=DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP=${{ env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP }} \
          --from-literal=ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production \
          --from-literal=ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080 \
          --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        
        # Ńīēäąåģ Secret ń ļąšīė’ģč
        kubectl create secret generic testproject-secrets \
          --from-literal=DB_PASSWORD='${{ secrets.YC_DB_PASSWORD }}' \
          --from-literal=JWT_SECRET='${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET }}' \
          --from-literal=ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Host=${{ secrets.YC_DB_HOST }};Port=6432;Database=${{ secrets.YC_DB_NAME }};Username=${{ secrets.YC_DB_USER }};Password=${{ secrets.YC_DB_PASSWORD }};Ssl Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true' \
          --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    
    - name: Deploy application with Kustomize
      run: |
        cd infra/k8s/overlays/prod
        
        # Īįķīāė’åģ image tag ā kustomization.yaml
        cat > kustomization.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

namespace: ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}

resources:
  - ../../base/
  - ../../base/namespace/
  - ../../base/postgres/
  - ../../base/networking/

images:
  - name: test-service
    newName: cr.yandex/${{ env.REGISTRY_ID }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
    newTag: "${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}"

patchesStrategicMerge:
  - patch-managed-db.yaml
  - ssl-patch.yaml

configMapGenerator:
  - name: test-service-config
    behavior: merge
    literals:
      - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production
      - DEPLOYMENT_VERSION=${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}

secretGenerator:
  - name: test-service-secrets
    behavior: merge
    envs:
      - .env.secret
EOF
        
        # Ļščģåķ’åģ źīķōčćóšąöčž
        kustomize build . | kubectl apply -f -
    
    - name: Wait for deployment to complete
      run: |
        kubectl rollout status deployment/test-service \
          --timeout=300s \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    
    - name: Verify deployment (.NET)
      run: |
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ ļīäū
        echo "=== Pods ==="
        kubectl get pods -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} -l app=test-service -o wide
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ ńåšāčń
        echo -e "\n=== Services ==="
        kubectl get svc -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} test-service
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ health endpoints
        echo -e "\n=== Health Checks ==="
        kubectl run -i --rm --restart=Never test-curl \
          --image=curlimages/curl:latest \
          --namespace=${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} \
          --command -- \
          sh -c '
            echo "Testing /health..."
            curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health || exit 1
            echo -e "\nTesting /health/ready..."
            curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health/ready || exit 1
            echo -e "\nTesting /health/live..."
            curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health/live || exit 1
          '
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ ėīćč
        echo -e "\n=== Recent Logs ==="
        kubectl logs -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} deployment/test-service --tail=20
        
        echo "? .NET Deployment verified successfully"
    
    - name: Create GitHub deployment
      uses: actions/github-script@v6
      if: success()
      with:
        script: |
          const deployment = await github.rest.repos.createDeployment({
            owner: context.repo.owner,
            repo: context.repo.repo,
            ref: context.sha,
            environment: '${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}',
            auto_merge: false,
            required_contexts: [],
            description: 'Deployment to Yandex Cloud Kubernetes (.NET 10)',
            payload: {
              version: '${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}',
              timestamp: '${{ env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP }}'
            }
          });
          
          const deploymentId = deployment.data.id;
          
          await github.rest.repos.createDeploymentStatus({
            owner: context.repo.owner,
            repo: context.repo.repo,
            deployment_id: deploymentId,
            state: 'success',
            description: '.NET 10 deployment completed successfully',
            environment_url: 'https://api.yourdomain.com', // Ēąģåķčņå ķą āąų äīģåķ
          });

  # ==================== ČĶŅÅĆŠĄÖČĪĶĶĪÅ ŅÅŃŅČŠĪĀĄĶČÅ (.NET API) ====================
  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests (.NET API)
    needs: deploy-to-production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Configure Yandex Cloud CLI
      uses: yandex-cloud/github-actions/setup-yc@v0.2.0
      with:
        service-account-key: ${{ env.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
    
    - name: Get kubeconfig
      run: |
        yc managed-kubernetes cluster get-credentials \
          ${{ env.K8S_CLUSTER_ID }} \
          --external
    
    - name: Run API integration tests
      run: |
        # Ńīēäąåģ ņåńņīāūé Job äė’ ļšīāåšźč API
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: batch/v1
        kind: Job
        metadata:
          name: api-integration-tests-${{ needs.setup.outputs.short_sha }}
          namespace: ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        spec:
          ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 300
          template:
            spec:
              containers:
              - name: api-test
                image: curlimages/curl:latest
                command: ["sh", "-c"]
                args:
                - |
                  echo "Waiting for service to be ready..."
                  for i in \$(seq 1 30); do
                    if curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health; then
                      echo "Service is ready!"
                      break
                    fi
                    echo "Attempt \$i: Service not ready yet..."
                    sleep 5
                  done
                  
                  # Ļšīāåš’åģ īńķīāķūå żķäļīčķņū API
                  echo "Testing API endpoints..."
                  
                  # Health endpoints
                  curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health || exit 1
                  curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health/ready || exit 1
                  
                  # Swagger/OpenAPI
                  curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/swagger/v1/swagger.json || exit 1
                  
                  # Āąųč API endpoints (ēąģåķčņå ķą āąųč)
                  # curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/api/v1/courses || exit 1
                  # curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/api/v1/lessons || exit 1
                  
                  echo "? All API tests passed!"
                env:
                - name: SERVICE_URL
                  value: http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080
              restartPolicy: Never
          backoffLimit: 3
        EOF
        
        # Ęäåģ ēąāåšųåķč’ Job
        kubectl wait --for=condition=complete \
          --timeout=300s \
          job/api-integration-tests-${{ needs.setup.outputs.short_sha }} \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        
        # Ļīėó÷ąåģ ėīćč
        echo "=== Test Logs ==="
        kubectl logs job/api-integration-tests-${{ needs.setup.outputs.short_sha }} \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
    
    - name: Cleanup test job
      if: always()
      run: |
        kubectl delete job api-integration-tests-${{ needs.setup.outputs.short_sha }} \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} \
          --ignore-not-found

  # ==================== ĢĪĶČŅĪŠČĶĆ Č ĄĖÅŠŅŪ ====================
  monitoring:
    name: Setup Monitoring & Alerts
    needs: deploy-to-production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: success()
    
    steps:
    - name: Send deployment notification
      uses: 8398a7/action-slack@v3
      with:
        status: ${{ job.status }}
        text: |
          :rocket: *Deployment Successful (.NET 10)*
           Project: ${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }}
           Environment: ${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}
           Version: ${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}
           .NET: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}
           Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
        fields: |
          [
            {"title": "Project", "value": "${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }}"},
            {"title": "Environment", "value": "${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}"},
            {"title": ".NET Version", "value": "${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}"},
            {"title": "Image Tag", "value": "${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}"},
            {"title": "Commit", "value": "${{ github.sha }}"}
          ]
      env:
        SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
    
    - name: Create Grafana annotation
      uses: instantish/grafana-annotation-action@v1
      with:
        grafana_url: ${{ secrets.GRAFANA_URL }}
        grafana_api_key: ${{ secrets.GRAFANA_API_KEY }}
        tags: deployment,dotnet,testproject,${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}
        text: |
          Deployment: ${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }} (.NET 10)
          Version: ${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}
          Environment: ${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}
          Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
          Timestamp: ${{ env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP }}

  # ==================== ĪŅŹĄŅ ĻŠČ ĶÅÓÄĄ×Å (.NET) ====================
  rollback-on-failure:
    name: Rollback on Failure (.NET)
    needs: [deploy-to-production, integration-tests]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: failure()
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Configure Yandex Cloud CLI
      uses: yandex-cloud/github-actions/setup-yc@v0.2.0
      with:
        service-account-key: ${{ env.YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
    
    - name: Get kubeconfig
      run: |
        yc managed-kubernetes cluster get-credentials \
          ${{ env.K8S_CLUSTER_ID }} \
          --external
    
    - name: Rollback to previous version
      run: |
        # Īņźąņūāąåģ deployment ź ļšåäūäółåé šåāčēčč
        kubectl rollout undo deployment/test-service \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        
        # Ęäåģ ēąāåšųåķč’ īņźąņą
        kubectl rollout status deployment/test-service \
          --timeout=300s \
          -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}
        
        echo "? Rollback completed successfully"
    
    - name: Verify rollback
      run: |
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ ņåźółóž āåšńčž
        CURRENT_IMAGE=$(kubectl get deployment test-service -n ${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}')
        echo "Current image after rollback: $CURRENT_IMAGE"
        
        # Ļšīāåš’åģ health
        kubectl run -i --rm --restart=Never test-rollback \
          --image=curlimages/curl:latest \
          --namespace=${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }} \
          --command -- \
          curl -f http://test-service.${{ env.K8S_NAMESPACE }}.svc.cluster.local:8080/health
    
    - name: Send rollback notification
      uses: 8398a7/action-slack@v3
      with:
        status: failure
        text: |
          :warning: *Deployment Failed - Rollback Initiated (.NET)*
           Project: ${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }}
           Environment: ${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}
           Failed Version: ${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}
           Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
           Error: Check GitHub Actions logs
        fields: |
          [
            {"title": "Project", "value": "${{ env.PROJECT_NAME }}"},
            {"title": "Environment", "value": "${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}"},
            {"title": "Failed Version", "value": "${{ needs.setup.outputs.image_tag }}"},
            {"title": "Status", "value": "Rolled back to previous version"}
          ]
      env:
        SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }} 
 
/.github\workflows\feature_request.md: 
---
name: Feature Request
about: Ļšåäėīęčņü ķīāóž ōóķźöčīķąėüķīńņü äė’ TestProject
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ?? Īļčńąķčå ōč÷č
×åņźīå č źšąņźīå īļčńąķčå ņīćī, ÷ņī āū õīņčņå äīįąāčņü

## ?? Ļšīįėåģą/Ģīņčāąöč’
Ļī÷åģó żņą ōč÷ą ķóęķą? Źąźą’ ļšīįėåģą šåųąåņń’?

## ?? Ļšåäėąćąåģīå šåųåķčå
Īļčųčņå źąź āū āčäčņå šåąėčēąöčž

## ?? Ąėüņåšķąņčāķūå āąščąķņū
Źąźčå ąėüņåšķąņčāķūå šåųåķč’ āū šąńńģąņščāąėč?

## ?? Ļščīščņåņ
- [ ] Āūńīźčé
- [ ] Ńšåäķčé
- [ ] Ķčēźčé

## ?? Äīļīėķčņåėüķūé źīķņåźńņ
Äīįąāüņå ėžįīé äšóćīé źīķņåźńņ čėč ńźščķųīņū ī ōč÷å ēäåńü.

# TestProject Pull Request

## ?? Īļčńąķčå čēģåķåķčé

- Closes # (ķīģåš issue)

/.github\workflows\Readme-my.txt: 
?? Źąź ķąńņšīčņü GitHub Secrets äė’ workflow:
bash
# Ķåīįõīäčģūå ńåźšåņū äė’ deploy-prod.yaml:

# Yandex Cloud
YC_FOLDER_ID="āąų-folder-id"
YC_CLOUD_ID="āąų-cloud-id"
YC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY='{"id":"...","service_account_id":"...","private_key":"..."}'
YC_REGISTRY_ID="āąų-registry-id"
YC_K8S_CLUSTER_ID="āąų-cluster-id"
YC_DB_CLUSTER_ID="āąų-db-cluster-id"

# Įąēą äąķķūõ
YC_DB_PASSWORD="āąų-ļąšīėü-įä"
PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET="āąų-ńåźšåņ-jwt"

# Ģīķčņīščķć č óāåäīģėåķč’
SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL="https://hooks.slack.com/..."
GRAFANA_URL="https://grafana.example.com"
GRAFANA_API_KEY="āąų-api-key"

# Źąź äīįąāčņü ńåźšåņū ā GitHub:
# 1. Ļåšåéäčņå ā Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions
# 2. Ķąęģčņå "New repository secret"
# 3. Äīįąāüņå źąęäūé ńåźšåņ ń čģåķåģ č ēķą÷åķčåģ
?? Ńņšóźņóšą ļīńėå ńīēäąķč’:
text
.github/
+-- workflows/
¦   +-- deploy-local.yaml      # CI äė’ ėīźąėüķīćī k8s
¦   L-- deploy-prod.yaml       # CD äė’ Yandex Cloud
+-- ISSUE_TEMPLATE/
¦   +-- bug_report.md          # Ųąįėīķ äė’ įąćīā
¦   L-- feature_request.md     # Ųąįėīķ äė’ ōč÷
+-- PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md   # Ųąįėīķ äė’ PR
+-- dependabot.yml             # Ąāņīīįķīāėåķčå ēąāčńčģīńņåé
L-- CODEOWNERS                 # Āėąäåėüöū źīäą (īļöčīķąėüķī)
?? Źąź ķą÷ąņü čńļīėüēīāąņü:
1. Ńīēäąéņå ļąļźó č ōąéėū:
bash
mkdir -p .github/{workflows,ISSUE_TEMPLATE}
touch .github/{PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md,dependabot.yml}
touch .github/workflows/{deploy-local.yaml,deploy-prod.yaml}
touch .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/{bug_report.md,feature_request.md}
2. Ķąńņšīéņå ńåźšåņū ā GitHub:
Ļåšåéäčņå ā āąų šåļīēčņīščé ķą GitHub

Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions

Äīįąāüņå ķåīįõīäčģūå ńåźšåņū (ńģ. āūųå)

3. Ēąļóńņčņå workflow:
Ļšč ļóųå ā develop ēąļóńņčņń’ deploy-local.yaml

Ļšč ļóųå ā main ēąļóńņčņń’ deploy-prod.yaml

Āšó÷ķóž ģīęķī ēąļóńņčņü ÷åšåē Actions > Workflow

Ņåļåšü ó āąń åńņü ļīėķą’ CI/CD ńčńņåģą äė’ TestProject! ??

/apps\test-service\docker-compose.yaml: 
services:
  # ==================== POSTGRESQL ====================
  postgres-test:
    container_name: testproject-postgres
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: testdb
      POSTGRES_USER: test_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test123
      POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: "--encoding=UTF-8 --lc-collate=C --lc-ctype=C"
    
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U test_user -d testdb"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # ==================== TEST SERVICE (.NET) ====================
  test-service:
    container_name: testproject-test-service
    build:
      context: ./apps/test-service
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5000:8080"
      - "5001:443"  # HTTPS ļīšņ
    
    environment:
      ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT: Development
      ASPNETCORE_URLS: http://+:8080;https://+:443
      ASPNETCORE_Kestrel__Certificates__Default__Path: /https/aspnetapp.pfx
      ASPNETCORE_Kestrel__Certificates__Default__Password: password
      
      # Connection string äė’ PostgreSQL
      ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection: Host=postgres-test;Port=5432;Database=testdb;Username=test_user;Password=test123
      
      # Įåēīļąńķīńņü
      JWT__Secret: your_super_secret_jwt_key_change_in_production
      JWT__ExpiresIn: 7d
      
      # CORS
      CORS__Origins: http://localhost:5000,http://localhost:3000
      
      # Ķąńņšīéźč ļščėīęåķč’
      AppSettings__LessonsPerPage: 20
      AppSettings__CoursesPerPage: 10
    
    volumes:
      # Äė’ šąēšąįīņźč: ģīķņčšóåģ čńõīäķūé źīä
      - ./apps/test-service:/src
      - ~/.nuget/packages:/root/.nuget/packages:ro
      - ~/.aspnet/https:/root/.aspnet/https:ro
    
    networks:
      - testproject-network
    
    depends_on:
      postgres-test:
        condition: service_healthy
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s

  # ==================== PGADMIN ====================
  pgadmin-test:
    container_name: testproject-pgadmin
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    
    environment:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: admin@testproject.com
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: admin123
      PGADMIN_CONFIG_SERVER_MODE: 'False'
    
    volumes:
      - pgadmin_data:/var/lib/pgadmin
    
    networks:
      - testproject-network
    
    depends_on:
      - postgres-test

  # ==================== REDIS ====================
  redis-test:
    container_name: testproject-redis
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes --requirepass redis123
    
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    
    networks:
      - testproject-network

  testproject-network:
    driver: bridge
    name: testproject-network

/apps\test-service\Dockerfile: 
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:10.0 AS build
WORKDIR /src

# Źīļčšóåģ ĀŃÅ ōąéėū (ńąģūé ļšīńņīé ńļīńīį)
COPY . .

# Ļóįėčźóåģ WebApi ļšīåźņ (dotnet publish ńąģ āūļīėķčņ restore)
RUN dotnet publish "WebApi/WebApi.csproj" -c Release -o /app/publish

FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:10.0 AS final
WORKDIR /app
EXPOSE 8080
COPY --from=build /app/publish .
ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "WebApi.dll"]

/apps\test-service\Domain\Domain.Entities\Course.cs: 
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Domain.Entities
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Źóšń.
    /// </summary>
    public class Course: IEntity<int>
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Čäåķņčōčźąņīš.
        /// </summary>
        public int Id { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Ķąčģåķīāąķčå.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Ńņīčģīńņü.
        /// </summary>
        public decimal Price { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Óšīźč.
        /// </summary>
        public virtual List<Lesson> Lessons { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Óäąėåķī.
        /// </summary>
        public bool Deleted { get; set; }
    }
}

/apps\test-service\Domain\Domain.Entities\IEntity.cs: 
namespace Domain.Entities
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Čķņåšōåéń ńółķīńņč ń čäåķņčōčźąņīšīģ.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TId"> Ņčļ čäåķņčōčźąņīšą. </typeparam>
    public interface IEntity<TId>
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Čäåķņčōčźąņīš.
        /// </summary>
        TId Id { get; set; }
    }
}

using System;

namespace Domain.Entities
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Óšīź.
    /// </summary>
    public class Lesson: IEntity<int>
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Čäåķņčōčźąņīš.
        /// </summary>
        public int Id { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary> Ņåģą. </summary>
        public string Subject { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Źóšń.
        /// </summary>
        public virtual Course Course { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Id źóšńą.
        /// </summary>
        public int CourseId { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Óäąėåķī.
        /// </summary>
        public bool Deleted { get; set; }
        
        //public DateTime DateTime { get; set; }
    }
}

/apps\test-service\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.EntityFramework\all_migrations.sql: 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "__EFMigrationsHistory" (
    "MigrationId" character varying(150) NOT NULL,
    "ProductVersion" character varying(32) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK___EFMigrationsHistory" PRIMARY KEY ("MigrationId")
);

START TRANSACTION;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    CREATE TABLE public."Courses" (
        "Id" integer GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
        "Name" text,
        "Price" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL,
        "Deleted" boolean NOT NULL,
        CONSTRAINT "PK_Courses" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
    );
    END IF;
END $EF$;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    CREATE TABLE public."Lessons" (
        "Id" integer GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
        "Subject" text,
        "CourseId" integer NOT NULL,
        "Deleted" boolean NOT NULL,
        CONSTRAINT "PK_Lessons" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
        CONSTRAINT "FK_Lessons_Courses_CourseId" FOREIGN KEY ("CourseId") REFERENCES public."Courses" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
    );
    END IF;
END $EF$;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    CREATE INDEX "IX_Courses_Name" ON public."Courses" ("Name");
    END IF;
END $EF$;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    CREATE INDEX "IX_Lessons_CourseId" ON public."Lessons" ("CourseId");
    END IF;
END $EF$;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    CREATE INDEX "IX_Lessons_Subject" ON public."Lessons" ("Subject");
    END IF;
END $EF$;

DO $EF$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "__EFMigrationsHistory" WHERE "MigrationId" = '20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL') THEN
    INSERT INTO "__EFMigrationsHistory" ("MigrationId", "ProductVersion")
    VALUES ('20260126130546_InitialPostgreSQL', '10.0.0');
    END IF;
END $EF$;
COMMIT;

 
 
/apps\test-service\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.EntityFramework\DatabaseContext.cs: 
using System;
using Domain.Entities;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace Infrastructure.EntityFramework
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Źīķņåźńņ.
    /// </summary>
    public class DatabaseContext : DbContext
    {
        public DatabaseContext(DbContextOptions<DatabaseContext> options) : base(options)
        {
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Źóšńū.
        /// </summary>
        public DbSet<Course> Courses { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Óšīźč.
        /// </summary>
        public DbSet<Lesson> Lessons { get; set; }

        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
        {
            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

            // Źīķōčćóšąöč’ äė’ PostgreSQL
            foreach (var entity in modelBuilder.Model.GetEntityTypes())
            {
                // Óńņąķąāėčāąåģ ńõåģó ļī óģīė÷ąķčž
                entity.SetSchema("public");

                foreach (var property in entity.GetProperties())
                {
                    if (property.ClrType == typeof(string))
                    {
                        // Äė’ PostgreSQL ėó÷ųå čńļīėüēīāąņü text āģåńņī nvarchar
                        property.SetColumnType("text");
                    }
                    else if (property.ClrType == typeof(decimal) || property.ClrType == typeof(decimal?))
                    {
                        // Äė’ äåķåęķūõ ēķą÷åķčé ā PostgreSQL
                        property.SetColumnType("decimal(18,2)");
                    }
                }
            }

            modelBuilder.Entity<Course>()
                .HasMany(u => u.Lessons)
                .WithOne(c => c.Course)
                .IsRequired();

            modelBuilder.Entity<Course>().Property(c => c.Name).HasMaxLength(100);
            modelBuilder.Entity<Lesson>().Property(c => c.Subject).HasMaxLength(100);

            // Åńėč ķóęķī ńīēäąņü čķäåźńū äė’ PostgreSQL
            modelBuilder.Entity<Course>().HasIndex(c => c.Name);
            modelBuilder.Entity<Lesson>().HasIndex(l => l.Subject);
        }

        protected override void OnConfiguring(DbContextOptionsBuilder optionsBuilder)
        {
            // Óäąėčņå čėč čēģåķčņå żņó ńņšīźó, ņąź źąź īķą ģīęåņ ļåšåīļšåäåė’ņü ķąńņšīéźč čē Startup
            // Åńėč õīņčņå ńīõšąķčņü ėīććčšīāąķčå, čńļīėüēóéņå óńėīāčå äė’ īźšóęåķč’
            if (Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT") == "Development")
            {
                optionsBuilder.LogTo(Console.WriteLine, LogLevel.Information);
            }
        }
    }
} 
 
/apps\test-service\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.EntityFramework\DesignTimeDbContextFactory.cs: 
using System;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using System.IO;

namespace Infrastructure.EntityFramework
{
    public class DesignTimeDbContextFactory : IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<DatabaseContext>
    {
        public DatabaseContext CreateDbContext(string[] args)
        {
            // Äīįąāė’åģ īņėąäī÷ķūé āūāīä
            Console.WriteLine("=== DesignTimeDbContextFactory ===");
            Console.WriteLine($"Current Directory: {Directory.GetCurrentDirectory()}");

            // Ļūņąåģń’ ķąéņč appsettings.json ā šąēķūõ ģåńņąõ
            var basePath1 = Directory.GetCurrentDirectory();
            var basePath2 = Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), "..", "WebApi");
            var basePath3 = Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), "..", "..", "WebApi");

            Console.WriteLine($"BasePath1 (Current): {basePath1}");
            Console.WriteLine($"BasePath2 (../WebApi): {basePath2}");
            Console.WriteLine($"BasePath3 (../../WebApi): {basePath3}");

            // Ļšīāåš’åģ ńółåńņāīāąķčå appsettings.json ā żņčõ ļóņ’õ
            Console.WriteLine($"appsettings.json exists in Current: {File.Exists(Path.Combine(basePath1, "appsettings.json"))}");
            Console.WriteLine($"appsettings.json exists in ../WebApi: {File.Exists(Path.Combine(basePath2, "appsettings.json"))}");
            Console.WriteLine($"appsettings.json exists in ../../WebApi: {File.Exists(Path.Combine(basePath3, "appsettings.json"))}");

            IConfigurationRoot configuration = new ConfigurationBuilder()
                .SetBasePath(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory())
                .AddJsonFile("appsettings.json")
                .AddJsonFile($"appsettings.{Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT") ?? "Development"}.json", optional: true)
                .Build();

            var connectionString = configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection");
            Console.WriteLine($"ConnectionString from config: {connectionString}");

            // Åńėč ńņšīźą ļīäźėž÷åķč’ ļóńņą’, čńļīėüēóåģ ēąļąńķīé āąščąķņ
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(connectionString))
            {
                connectionString = "Host=localhost;Port=5432;Database=myappdb;Username=myappuser;Password=postgres;";
                Console.WriteLine($"Using fallback connection string: {connectionString}");
            }

            Console.WriteLine("=== End DesignTimeDbContextFactory ===");

            var builder = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<DatabaseContext>();
            builder.UseNpgsql(connectionString,
                options => options.MigrationsAssembly(typeof(DatabaseContext).Assembly.FullName));

            return new DatabaseContext(builder.Options);
        }
    }
} 
 
/apps\test-service\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.EntityFramework\EntityFrameworkInstaller.cs: 
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace Infrastructure.EntityFramework
{
    public static class EntityFrameworkInstaller
    {
        public static IServiceCollection ConfigureContext(this IServiceCollection services,
            string connectionString)
        {
            services.AddDbContext<DatabaseContext>(optionsBuilder
                => optionsBuilder
                    //.UseLazyLoadingProxies() // lazy loading
                    .UseSqlite(connectionString));
                    //.UseSqlServer(connectionString));

                    #region health checks
                    
                    services.AddHealthChecks()
                        .AddDbContextCheck<DatabaseContext>(
                            tags: new[] { "db_ef_healthcheck" },
                            customTestQuery: async (context, token) =>
                            {
                                return await context.Lessons.AnyAsync(token);
                            });

                    #endregion
                    return services;
        }
    }
}

/apps\test-service\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.Repositories.Implementations\CourseRepository.cs: 
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Services.Repositories.Abstractions;
using Domain.Entities;
using Infrastructure.EntityFramework;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Services.Contracts.Course;

namespace Infrastructure.Repositories.Implementations
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Šåļīēčņīščé šąįīņū ń źóšńąģč.
    /// </summary>
    public class CourseRepository: Repository<Course, int>, ICourseRepository
    {
        public CourseRepository(DatabaseContext context): base(context)
        {
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Ļīėó÷čņü ńółķīńņü ļī ID.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="id"> Id ńółķīńņč. </param>
        /// <returns> Źóšń. </returns>
        public override async Task<Course> GetAsync(int id)
        {
            var query = Context.Set<Course>().AsQueryable();
            return await query.SingleOrDefaultAsync(c=>c.Id == id);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Ļīėó÷čņü ļīńņšąķč÷ķūé ńļčńīź.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="filterDto"> ÄŅĪ ōčėüņšą. </param>
        /// <returns> Ńļčńīź źóšńīā. </returns>
        public async Task<List<Course>> GetPagedAsync(CourseFilterDto filterDto)
        {
            var query = GetAll()
                .Where(c => !c.Deleted)
                //.Include(c => c.Lessons)
                .AsQueryable();
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterDto.Name))
            {
                query = query.Where(c => c.Name == filterDto.Name);
            }

            if (filterDto.Price.HasValue)
            {
                query = query.Where(c => c.Price == filterDto.Price);
            }

            query = query
                .Skip((filterDto.Page - 1) * filterDto.ItemsPerPage)
                .Take(filterDto.ItemsPerPage);

            return await query.ToListAsync();
        }
    }
}
